description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and extensive use of large, grid-patterned windows on multiple sides, allowing for abundant natural light. The exterior is predominantly white with black metal railings enclosing two distinct outdoor spaces: a ground-level garden patio and an upper-level terrace. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with flat roofs and a minimalist aesthetic. The main entryway is set behind a black metal gate, leading to a landscaped area with greenery and a wooden deck. The rear and side facades are more solid, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall impression is of a contemporary urban residence designed for both comfort and style.
description: A modern, two-story house with large grid windows, flat roofs, and black metal railings enclosing a garden patio and terrace. The exterior is white and minimalist, with a focus on natural light and urban living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, black metal gate, landscaped garden patio, and large grid windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, windowed facade, upper terrace, and the solid white exterior with minimal openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows, emphasizing privacy and the depth of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, garden patio, and the clean, flat surfaces of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid-patterned windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway behind a black metal gate, leading to a landscaped patio with a modern door and minimal decorative elements.
